notes.title: Common Start
notes.text: The common graph path begins here.

notes.title: Common Target
notes.text: The common one-hop target is reachable.

notes.title: Chain Start
notes.text: The multi-hop chain begins here.

notes.title: Chain Middle
notes.text: The chain continues through this note.

notes.title: Chain End
notes.text: The multi-hop target ends here.

notes.title: Filter Start
notes.text: One edge is a dependency and one is merely adjacent.

notes.title: Filter Target
notes.text: This dependency is relevant to the filtered traversal.

notes.title: Filter Distractor
notes.text: This adjacent note is a deliberate distractor.

notes.title: Direction Source
notes.text: This note points into the direction center.

notes.title: Direction Center
notes.text: Outgoing traversal should not follow the incoming edge.

notes.title: Direction Target
notes.text: This note is the outgoing dependency.

notes.title: Governed Claim
notes.text: The governed conclusion is tied to source, evidence, and a precise claim.

notes.title: Architecture Source
notes.text: The architecture record is the source for the governed claim.

notes.title: Test Evidence
notes.text: The preserved receipt verifies the governed claim.

notes.title: Verified Result
notes.text: The result is supported by a specific claim block.

notes.title: Old Policy
notes.text: This policy is retained as history but is no longer current.

notes.title: Current Policy
notes.text: This policy is the active replacement.

notes.title: Retry Budget Design
notes.text: Retries should use exponential backoff with jitter to avoid synchronized retry storms.

notes.title: Coffee Roasting Notes
notes.text: Light roasts preserve more origin flavor than dark roasts which taste more uniformly bitter.

notes.title: Segment Compaction
notes.text: Periodic compaction merges small segment files into larger ones to reduce read amplification.

notes.title: Migratory Bird Patterns
notes.text: Many songbird species migrate thousands of miles between breeding and wintering grounds each year.

blocks.text: A precise claim supports the verified result.
